introSection: Coaster Though the Clouds is steel roller coaster located at Nanchang Sunac Land in Xinjian, Nanchang, Jiangxi, China. It is currently the tallest and fastest roller coaster in China.

sections.title: History
sections.content: Construction began in Spring 2015. By June, the lift hill had been completed. The ride opened with the park on 28 May 2016.

fullText:
Coaster Though the Clouds is steel roller coaster located at Nanchang Sunac Land in Xinjian, Nanchang, Jiangxi, China. It is currently the tallest and fastest roller coaster in China.

Construction began in Spring 2015. By June, the lift hill had been completed. The ride opened with the park on 28 May 2016.



Red track with green supports.
